security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8808 http://localhost:8808

bundle.shortDescription: Local MLX LoRA fine-tuning studio — pure-local, model-agnostic.
bundle.longDescription: Menu-bar app for fine-tuning any MLX-compatible base with LoRA on Apple Silicon: pick a base, ingest any SFT schema with a templated preview, run a memory-guarded LoRA pass with live loss, export GGUF/fused/adapter. Pure-local — data and models never leave the Mac.
